00028 namespace sprite
00029 {
00030   namespace mpl = boost::mpl;
00031   namespace tr1 = std::tr1;
00032 
00033   using boost::disable_if;
00034   using boost::disable_if_c;
00035   using boost::enable_if;
00036   using boost::enable_if_c;
00037   using boost::is_pointer;
00038   using boost::is_same;
00039   using boost::shared_ptr;
00040   using boost::static_visitor;
00041   using boost::dynamic_pointer_cast;
00042 
00044   struct RuntimeError : std::exception
00045   {
00046     explicit RuntimeError(std::string const & msg = std::string())
00047       : m_msg("a runtime error occurred")
00048     {
00049       if(msg.size() > 0) { m_msg += ": " + msg; }
00050     }
00051     virtual char const * what() const throw() { return m_msg.c_str(); }
00052     virtual ~RuntimeError() throw() {}
00053   private:
00054     std::string m_msg;
00055   };
00056 
00057   typedef boost::uint_t<32>::exact uint32;
00058 
00066   enum TagValue { FAIL=0, OPER, CHOICE, FWD, INT, FLOAT, CTOR };
00067 
00069   inline TagValue make_ctor_tag(int i)
00070   {
00071     assert(i>=CTOR);
00072     return static_cast<TagValue>(i);
00073   }
00074 
00076   inline bool is_ctor(TagValue x)
00077   {
00078     switch(x)
00079     {
00080       case FAIL: case OPER: case CHOICE: case FWD: return false;
00081       default: return true;
00082     }
00083   }
00084 
00086   inline bool is_builtin(TagValue x)
00087   {
00088     switch(x)
00089     {
00090       case INT: case FLOAT: return true;
00091       default: return false;
00092     }
00093   }
00094 
00096   namespace meta
00097   {
00103     template<sprite::TagValue C> struct TagValue
00104     {
00105       static sprite::TagValue const value = C;
00106       typedef TagValue<C> type;
00107       typedef sprite::TagValue value_type;
00108       operator sprite::TagValue() const { return value; }
00109     };
00110   
00112     template<sprite::TagValue> struct ValueType;
00113     template<> struct ValueType<INT> { typedef boost::int_t<64>::exact type; };
00114     template<> struct ValueType<FLOAT> { typedef double type; };
00115   }
00116 }
